title: tephrosia viridiflora
intro: Tephrosia viridiflora, also known as the green leafed horsefly vine, is a plant species in the legume family native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as pain relief, wound healing, and improved immune function. Tephrosia viridiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine practices in various forms, including a paste or powder.
